items.summary: Replace the current admin principals set in backend/main.mo with a stable set seeded with BOTH of the following principals: '6ngnc-ph7ou-g23nw-z2zbr-czprs-ohpe6-2wolp-eeo7o-c32lo-deiso-yqe' and 'g3c77-j7yp6-ydsrd-2zp2q-vajyd-4ymec-tydvo-kcxwl-s7reg-37yws-eae'. The set must be declared as a stable variable so it persists across upgrades.
Update the isAdmin(caller) function in backend/main.mo to return true if and only if the caller's principal is present in the stable admin principals set.
Update the getMyRole() function in backend/main.mo so that if isAdmin(caller) is true, it returns #admin regardless of the stored user role. Otherwise, it returns the stored user role as before.
